title: Lordphenex Potion Bag
description: With this potion bag, you can store multiple potions in a single slot
body:
Have you ever been bothered by the fact potions are non stackable ? That having multiple ones is a real pain when exploring ?

Then this datapack is made for you ! It allows you to craft potion bags that can contain multiple potions at once without mixing them up. With this datapack, bringing potions with you is not a problem anymore, letting you explore even more of your world !


## How does it works ?

It's simple ! First craft yourself a potion bag with 8 water bottles and a chest like shown in the image above.
Then simply pick up potions while holding your bag in the mainhand to store them in it. The bag will be displayed as the currently active potion.
The active potion is not the potion that you want to use ? Really simple : just sneak and swap hands. This will make the active potion change.
You want to improve the active potion ? Simple : drop the active potion with your dropping key and then use it as you want in your brewing station.
